title: pyrus cydonia var. oblonga
intro: Pyrus cydonia var. oblonga, also known as Quince, is a deciduous shrub or small tree with fragrant, yellow flowers and edible fruits. The medicinal properties of Quince have been used to treat digestive issues, such as diarrhea and dysentery, due to its anthelmintic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Quince include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and aid in digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Quince can be prepared as a decoction, tea, or jelly, and its seeds, bark, and leaves can be used in herbal preparations, such as tinctures and infusions.
